events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana across Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. Currently planning activities and shopping for eyeglasses.
events.hook: Complete eyeglasses store research in Kyoto, validate insurance/prescription requirements, and finalize activity plans for Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
